headerDisplay: Pulls current conditions from the WeatherLink v2 cloud API and exposes them to HomeKit. Get your API Key and Secret from the lower-left of your account page at weatherlink.com.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: The v2 API key (sent as the api-key query parameter).

apiSecret.title: API Secret
apiSecret.description: The v2 API secret (sent as the X-Api-Secret header).

stationId.title: Station ID (optional)
stationId.description: Leave blank to auto-discover from your account. Only needed if you have more than one station and want to pin a specific one.

pollMinutes.title: Poll interval (minutes)
pollMinutes.description: Match your weatherlink.com tier: ~15 (free) or ~5 (Pro). Polling faster than the data refreshes just wastes API calls.

manufacturer.title: Manufacturer
manufacturer.description: Shown in the Home app accessory details. Defaults to Davis Instruments.

model.title: Model
model.description: Shown in the Home app accessory details. Defaults to Vantage Vue.

enableFeelsLike.title: Outdoor THW index
enableFeelsLike.description: Davis temperature-humidity-wind 'feels like' value, shown as a temperature sensor.
